SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?lake ?lakeLabel WHERE {
  VALUES ?lake {
    wd:Q3720 wd:Q11300 wd:Q574805
  }
  ?lake rdfs:label ?lakeLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?lakeLabel) = "en")
}
LIMIT 3
```

  FILTER(?areaValue > 2000)  # filter for large lakes
  FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?lake wdt:P1370 wd:Q12392 }  # exclude Great Lakes
  ?lake rdfs:label ?lakeLabel.
  FILTER(LANG(?lakeLabel) = "en")
}
LIMIT 3
